ISessionProviderGetSessionGroupAsync Method

One Identity Manager API Server
Acquires the session group for the specified HTTP context.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Session
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
Task<ISessionGroup> GetSessionGroupAsync(
	HttpContext context,
	CancellationToken ct = null
)

Parameters

context
Type: HttpContext
ct (Optional)
Type: System.ThreadingCancellationToken

Return Value

Type: TaskISessionGroup
Remarks
This method tries to assign an existing session group using the imx_sessiongroup cookie or using an Authorization header. A new session group is created and assigned if none was found.
See Also

Reference

ISessionProvider Interface
